issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving double tasks in pre-referral and post-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were generating duplicate tasks across pre-referral and post-referral workflows. The root cause was identified as a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations, which Hubspot confirmed was an issue with associations and filters. Madelaine worked with HubSpot support to resolve it.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or delete the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks for deals that had already been marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow filters were not correctly suppressing task generation for these terminal deal stages. Madelaine made a tweak to the filters to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any check-in tasks that were incorrectly generated for deals already marked as Closed Lost or Transferred.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change on deal
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails continued to reference the previous LO rather than the updated one. The issue was reported for a specific deal where the LO was changed to Julie Yocum but emails still showed Paul. Luis resolved the issue on the product/backend side.
issues.workaround: Manually resend any automated emails that went out with the incorrect LO information and verify the correct LO is reflected before sending.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering when deal stage toggled back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, then reverted to a prior stage, and then set back to Offer Accepted again, the TC workflow and associated tasks would not re-trigger. The root cause was that 'deal stage offer accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criteria in the workflow. Madelaine added it as a re-enrollment trigger to fix the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were moved back to Offer Accepted during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks.

issues.title: MRC deals marked Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow, meaning TCs were not receiving their required tasks for these deals. HubSpot support was contacted and identified the root cause. Madelaine confirmed the issue was fixed after speaking with HubSpot support.
issues.workaround: Manually send closing info collection emails and enroll any MRC deals marked Offer Accepted during the impact window into the TC workflow.
